panels.title: KEDA Version

panels.description: Number of KEDA Metrics API Server pods currently running.
panels.title: Metrics API Server Pods

panels.description: Number of KEDA Admission Webhooks pods currently running.
panels.title: Admission Webhooks Pods

panels.description: ScaledObjects + ScaledJobs registered
panels.title: Total KEDA Resources

panels.description: Number of ScaledObject resources
panels.title: ScaledObjects

panels.description: Number of ScaledJob resources
panels.title: ScaledJobs

panels.description: Distinct namespaces with active scalers
panels.title: Namespaces Using KEDA

panels.description: ScaledObjects and ScaledJobs registered over time
panels.title: KEDA Resource Count Over Time

panels.description: Per-ScaledObject error rate (errors/sec) over time
panels.title: ScaledObject Error Rate

panels.description: CPU and memory request/limit vs actual usage per KEDA component

targets.expression: SELECT A.container AS Component, A.__value__ AS Pods, B.__value__ AS CPUUsage, C.__value__ AS CPURequest, CASE WHEN C.__value__ > 0 THEN B.__value__ / C.__value__ ELSE NULL END AS CPUReqRatio, G.__value__ AS CPULimit, CASE WHEN G.__value__ > 0 THEN B.__value__ / G.__value__ ELSE NULL END AS CPULimRatio, D.__value__ AS MemUsage, E.__value__ AS MemRequest, CASE WHEN E.__value__ > 0 THEN D.__value__ / E.__value__ ELSE NULL END AS MemReqRatio, H.__value__ AS MemLimit, CASE WHEN H.__value__ > 0 THEN D.__value__ / H.__value__ ELSE NULL END AS MemLimRatio FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.container = B.container LEFT JOIN C ON A.container = C.container LEFT JOIN D ON A.container = D.container LEFT JOIN E ON A.container = E.container LEFT JOIN G ON A.container = G.container LEFT JOIN H ON A.container = H.container LIMIT 20

panels.title: Component Resource Usage

panels.description: CPU usage (cores) per KEDA component over time
panels.title: KEDA CPU Usage (cores)

panels.description: Memory working set per KEDA component over time
panels.title: KEDA Memory Usage

panels.description: Scalers that are currently active and returning metric values, grouped by scaledObject, namespace, trigger type and scaler name.
panels.title: Active Scalers

panels.description: Current metric value reported by each scaler. This value is used by KEDA to make scaling decisions.
panels.title: Scaler Metrics Value

panels.description: Time taken to fetch metrics from each external scaler source. High latency may indicate connectivity issues with the metric backend.
panels.title: Scaler Metrics Latency

panels.description: Rate of errors encountered by individual scalers. Persistent errors may block correct autoscaling behaviour.
panels.title: Scaler Errors Rate

panels.description: Per-resource detail: trigger, scale target, replicas, utilization, error rate

targets.expr: max by (namespace, scaledObject, scaletargetref_kind, scaletargetref_name) (label_replace(kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_info{horizontalpodautoscaler=~"keda-hpa-.+", namespace=~"$namespace"}, "scaledObject", "$1", "horizontalpodautoscaler", "keda-hpa-(.*)"))

targets.expression: SELECT CASE WHEN B.scaletargetref_kind IS NOT NULL THEN 'ScaledObject' ELSE 'ScaledJob' END AS ResourceType, A.__value__ AS Active, A.exported_namespace AS Namespace, A.scaledObject AS Name, A.scaler AS TriggerType, B.scaletargetref_kind AS ScaleKind, B.scaletargetref_name AS ScaleTarget, C.__value__ AS Current, D.__value__ AS Min, E.__value__ AS Max, CASE WHEN E.__value__ > 0 THEN C.__value__ / E.__value__ ELSE NULL END AS UtilPct, I.__value__ AS TriggerValue, H.__value__ AS ScalerErrRate, G.__value__ AS ObjErrRate FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.exported_namespace = B.namespace AND A.scaledObject = B.scaledObject LEFT JOIN C ON A.exported_namespace = C.namespace AND A.scaledObject = C.scaledObject LEFT JOIN D ON A.exported_namespace = D.namespace AND A.scaledObject = D.scaledObject LEFT JOIN E ON A.exported_namespace = E.namespace AND A.scaledObject = E.scaledObject LEFT JOIN G ON A.exported_namespace = G.exported_namespace AND A.scaledObject = G.scaledObject LEFT JOIN H ON A.exported_namespace = H.namespace AND A.scaledObject = H.scaledObject AND A.scaler = H.scaler LEFT JOIN I ON A.exported_namespace = I.exported_namespace AND A.scaledObject = I.scaledObject AND A.scaler = I.scaler LIMIT 100

panels.title: ScaledObject / ScaledJob Details

panels.description: Number of registered triggers by type
panels.title: Trigger Register

panels.description: Number of goroutines currently processing reconciliation requests, broken down per controller.
panels.title: Controller Active Workers

panels.description: Rate of reconciliation errors per controller. Elevated errors indicate problems processing KEDA custom resources.
panels.title: Controller Reconcile Errors Rate

panels.description: P99 / P95 / P50 latency of reconciliation loops per controller. High values mean the controller is slow to react to resource changes.
panels.title: Reconcile Duration

panels.description: Rate at which items are being enqueued into the work queue per controller.
panels.title: Work Queue Adds Rate

panels.description: Current depth of the work queue. A growing queue indicates a processing backlog.
panels.title: Work Queue Size

panels.description: P99 / P95 / P50 time that items spend waiting in the queue before being picked up for processing.
panels.title: Work Queue Duration

panels.description: Rate at which items are being re-queued due to failures. Sustained high retries indicate recurring processing errors.
panels.title: Work Queue Retries Rate

panels.description: P99 / P95 / P50 time taken to fully process each work queue item from start to completion.
panels.title: Work Queue Task Duration

panels.description: Time that work queue items have been processing but not yet finished. Sustained high values indicate stuck workers.
panels.title: Work Queue Unfinished Work Duration

panels.description: Rate of gRPC requests handled by the internal metrics service gRPC server, grouped by status code (OK, Unimplemented, etc.).
panels.title: GRPC Server Handled Rate

panels.description: P99 / P95 / P50 latency of gRPC request handling for the internal metrics service. High values indicate slow metric retrieval between operator components.
panels.title: GRPC Server Handling Duration

panels.description: Difference between gRPC messages received and sent by the server. Non-zero values may indicate unbalanced streams or message delivery issues.
panels.title: GRPC Server Msg Received/Sent Diff

panels.description: Rate of internal scale loop latency. Measures how long the scale loop takes per resource per namespace. High values indicate the scaling loop is falling behind.
panels.title: Loop Latency
